page: Microsoft Azure FX32mds_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the FXmdsv2 family, virtualized via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs derived from 16 physical Intel Xeon 8573C cores operating at a high base frequency of 4.2 GHz. The processor includes a 260 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX). The server is equipped with 672.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 21.0 GB per core, and includes 1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.

In benchmark evaluations, the FX32mds_v2 demonstrates top-tier performance in single-core processing, highlighted by Geekbench single-core and text processing scores in the top 10% tier. Multi-core performance is strong, placing in the top 25% for Passmark CPU, Geekbench multi-core, and bzip3 decompression tests. Memory subsystem performance is robust, with uncached read and write large-block memory bandwidth benchmarks ranking in the top 25%. The server also shows strong throughput in static web serving and prompt processing for small and medium language models, though text generation with large 70B models is a relative bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 25%.

Given its high memory density of 21.0 GB per core and dedicated high-frequency Intel Xeon processor, this server offers a specialized hardware profile. The resource allocation represents a qualitative trade-off favoring memory-intensive and high-frequency compute tasks over massive parallelization. It is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale database operations, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications requiring substantial RAM alongside high single-threaded CPU performance.
description: Microsoft Azure FX32mds_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the FXmdsv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs from 16 physical Intel Xeon 8573C cores clocked at 4.2 GHz, backed by a 260 MB L3 cache and advanced instruction sets like AMX and AVX-512. The system is configured with 672.0 GB of RAM, yielding 21.0 GB per core, and includes 1890 GB of local storage. Benchmark results place its single-core and text processing capabilities in the top 10% tier, with strong performance in memory bandwidth, multi-core processing, and static web serving. This server is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large databases, and workloads requiring high single-threaded performance.
og_description: Microsoft Azure FX32mds_v2 is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs at 4.2 GHz, 672 GB of RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier single-core performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure FX32mds_v2 is a memory-optimized server with 32 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage for demanding database workloads.
tagline: A high-frequency, memory-intensive virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and massive RAM capacity for demanding database and enterprise workloads.

672.0 GB of system memory providing 21.0 GB per core
1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-core and text processing benchmark performance
Optimized for memory-intensive databases and enterprise applications
